anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Stage-specific and operative-consensus cases, such as breath attention in early Buddhist practice, basic Vinaya rules, or a catechism-level Christian confession.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence in any simple variance metric. Raises the need for operative weighting and inter-rater reliability before the gate can carry public evidential weight.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: A tradition can have enormous textual and historical variance while still giving practitioners a narrow operative instruction at a defined stage. If the denominator counts every variant equally, it will falsely mark stable practice instructions as selection-dependent. If it weights only operative variants, the model becomes dependent on disputed judgments about authority, institution, stage, and living practice.

claim_units: Between-tradition strain is unreliable without within-tradition variance.
Traditions vary across sub-schools, stages, genres, institutions, and polemical eras.
If internal variance rivals the cross-tradition gap, the verdict depends on which internal variant was selected.
Within-tradition variance must be weighted by operative practice centrality, not raw textual existence.
A comparison can pass a provenance gate but fail a variance gate.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: For high-variance categories, slogan-level comparisons will flip depending on which internal school, stage, or institution is selected. Weighted internal-variance coding will reduce false convergence and false opposition.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: Before comparing capitalism and socialism, CBT and ACT, or secular mindfulness and Buddhist meditation, one must check whether each category varies internally more than the alleged cross-category gap.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Cross-domain comparison verdicts remain stable across internal variants, or ordinary category labels explain outcomes better than weighted internal-variance scores.

exact_claim: A translation-strain score needs a denominator. Before claiming that two traditions converge or clash on a claim unit, Lumenary must measure weighted within-tradition variance for the same unit. If internal spread is as wide as the between-tradition gap, the comparison is selection-dependent and should receive no evidential weight.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders assigned Theravada anatta versus Pudgalavada person, and Shankara-style self-recognition versus scriptural-testimony Advaita, will return contradictory convergence or divergence verdicts for the Atman and anatta comparison.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: High internal-variance units should produce unstable convergence verdicts.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Blind coder experiment with controlled claim units and assigned internal variants.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Convergence verdicts stay stable no matter which legitimate internal variant is selected.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Comparisons on narrower practice instructions, such as attending to breath, ethical restraint, or confession of fault, will show stronger agreement among coders than metaphysical self comparisons.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Low internal-variance units should produce stable verdicts.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Inter-rater comparison study across high-variance and low-variance claim units.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Verdict stability is not predicted by internal-variance scores, or low-variance units produce just as much disagreement.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Weighting variants by living practice centrality, stage, institution, and teacher use will change which comparisons fail the variance gate.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Operative weighting matters more than raw textual spread.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Expert and practitioner weighting exercise with inter-rater reliability analysis.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Raw textual variance and operative weighted variance produce the same decisions, or experts cannot agree on weights above chance.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Some comparisons will be historically independent but internally unstable, while others will be internally stable but historically entangled through borrowing, shared translators, or modern discourse.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The variance gate is orthogonal to the provenance gate.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Paired application of provenance-first coding and variance-gate coding to the same comparison set.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Provenance and internal variance always move together, making the new gate redundant.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Stable reflective readers exposed to online comparative slogans show less all-is-one universalism and less cynical dismissal, while still choosing one concrete practice action within a week.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The self-agreement check helps a specific modern cohort without becoming avoidance.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small randomized pilot with measures for rumination, action completion, cynicism, false-harmony endorsement, and practice commitment.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The practice increases rumination, paralysis, distrust, or avoidance of commitment compared with a simple source-humility prompt.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate adds an explicit admissibility threshold: between-tradition strain must exceed weighted internal variance.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Substantial downgrade, but the denominator rule may still be a useful synthesis.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close on selection of comparands, scale, scope, and the need to defend what is being compared.
near_neighbors.source: Oliver Freiberger, Elements of a Comparative Methodology in the Study of Religion, https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/9/2/38

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate makes selection-dependence testable through internal-variance controls.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Reduces novelty of the selection-artifact warning.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on comparison being an act of scholarly redescription shaped by selected examples rather than a neutral discovery of natural sameness.
near_neighbors.source: Jonathan Z. Smith, In Comparison a Magic Dwells and related comparison essays, https://classics.osu.edu/sites/classics.osu.edu/files/Magic_Dwells.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies the critique to claim-unit scoring and requires a variance denominator before convergence evidence is admitted.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Internal diversity itself is known prior art.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on abstracted religions flattening internal diversity and hybrid lived practice.
near_neighbors.source: World Religions Paradigm critiques, for example context and essentialism discussion at https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/20503032241226966

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate moves from anti-reification to a scoring protocol for specific comparative claims.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Supports extended or synthesis status, not discovery.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on resisting static treatment of a religion as one thing with one essence.
near_neighbors.source: Wilfred Cantwell Smith on religion as reified category, overview at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wilfred_Cantwell_Smith

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate imports the structure into religious comparison and adds operative-practice weighting.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: The denominator structure is known, but its application to translation strain is a novel synthesis.
near_neighbors.overlap: Near exact structural model outside the domain: a between-group difference must be interpreted against within-group variation and measurement noise.
near_neighbors.source: Statistical effect size, heterogeneity, and multilevel reasoning, general reference at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Effect_size

near_neighbors.difference: This is evidence for the gate, not the gate itself.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Raises source relevance but also exposes weighting problems because Pudgalavada is historically important but not a living mainstream lineage.
near_neighbors.overlap: Provides the internal Buddhist variance case the model relies on: not-self sutta discipline versus a real or inexpressible person in Buddhist scholastic debate.
near_neighbors.source: Pudgalavada Buddhist Philosophy, IEP, https://iep.utm.edu/pudgalavada-buddhist-philosophy/; Kathavatthu PDF, https://www.abhidhamma.com/Kathavatthu_en.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: Again an example of internal spread rather than a full comparative scoring method.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Supports the anomaly pressure against broad tradition labels.
near_neighbors.overlap: Shows internal contest over assertion posture, independent argument, and reductio within a broad Madhyamaka family.
near_neighbors.source: Madhyamaka, SEP, https://plato.stanford.edu/archives/spr2022/entries/madhyamaka/; Dreyfus and McClintock, The Svatantrika-Prasangika Distinction, publisher listing https://wisdomexperience.org/product/svatantrika-prasangika-distinction/

near_neighbors.difference: This candidate adds a denominator gate that asks whether each side is internally stable enough to compare.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Keeps this as novel_synthesis rather than candidate discovery.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close on provenance, role, authority, verification, and translation strain before granting convergence.
near_neighbors.source: Internal Lumenary prior: Translation Strain as a Load Test for Convergence and A Shared Word Is Not Two Witnesses from project memory.

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine. Treat as a methodological control for translation-strain scoring.

Build a variance-gate codebook with fields for claim unit, tradition, source layer, genre, stage, institution, internal variants, operative weight, evidence passage, between-tradition strain, within-tradition variance, provenance status, and confidence.
Require operative weighting and inter-rater reliability before using the gate publicly.
Test first on Atman and anatta, Buddhist personhood, Advaita self-knowledge, Madhyamaka assertion posture, breath attention, ethical restraint, and a low-variance ritual instruction.
Run the variance gate and provenance gate on the same comparison set to test orthogonality.
Add safety limits to The Self-Agreement Check: no more than twice weekly, stop for rumination, paralysis, cynicism, distrust, or avoidance of concrete practice.
Compare against baselines: Freiberger selection and scope review, ordinary source criticism, world-religions anti-essentialism, provenance-first coding, and a simple source-humility prompt.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.60 to 0.52. The idea combines known internal-diversity critique, comparative-method selection theory, anti-essentialism, and statistical effect-size logic. The possible contribution is the explicit denominator gate for Lumenary translation-strain scoring. Human-condition fit is moderate: it serves reflective readers unsettled by digital comparison and meaning loss, but it is not a practice for acute distress or for people using analysis to avoid commitment.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Scholars say careful comparativists already do this under selection, scale, scope, representativeness, and anti-essentialism, or practitioners say operative teaching is much narrower than textual variance. Originality also falls if coders cannot weight variants reliably.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners and scholars identify cases where the variance gate flips comparison verdicts, catches false AI or influencer summaries, and predicts when comparison will destabilize seekers without improving practice.
questions: Would this variance gate change any comparison decision you would not already change through ordinary selection, scope, and internal-diversity cautions?
How should marginal, extinct, polemical, minority, stage-specific, and living-practice variants be weighted?
Can you name a comparison that passes provenance but fails internal-variance stability?
Can you name a comparison whose internal disputes are pedagogical registers rather than real divergence?
For modern seekers, does this check reduce false certainty, or does it feed analysis paralysis and avoidance of practice?
relevant_practitioners: statisticians or social scientists familiar with variance and effect size

primary_pair: SN 22.59, https://www.accesstoinsight.org/ati/tipitaka/sn/sn22/sn22.059.nymo.html, read against Kathavatthu Puggalakatha and Pudgalavada reconstruction, https://www.abhidhamma.com/Kathavatthu_en.pdf and https://iep.utm.edu/pudgalavada-buddhist-philosophy/

Brihadaranyaka Upanishad 3.7.23, https://sacred-texts.com/hin/sbe15/sbe15070.htm, read against internal Advaita questions of self-luminosity, scripture, and recognition, with Madhyamaka assertion-posture pressure from SEP, https://plato.stanford.edu/archives/spr2022/entries/madhyamaka/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: Medium high. The variance analogy can inflate marginal, extinct, polemical, or purely scholastic variants and make every tradition look too unstable to compare. Some internal differences are stage-specific pedagogy, genre difference, or skillful means rather than contradiction. Operative weighting is essential but contestable. Human-condition fit is modest: it helps digitally unsettled readers resist false harmony and cynical dismissal, but it can worsen analysis paralysis in over-reflective people who need commitment more than more comparison.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: Before raising novelty, read Freiberger on selection, scale, scope, and comparands; Jonathan Z. Smith on comparison and redescription; Wilfred Cantwell Smith on reification of religion; world religions paradigm critiques; Clooney and Cornille on comparative theology; Dreyfus and McClintock on Svatantrika-Prasangika; Priestley or other Pudgalavada scholarship; Shankara and Advaita studies on svaprakasha and shabda pramana; and statistical literature on effect size, heterogeneity, multilevel models, and within-group versus between-group variance.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: SN 22.59 trains disidentification from form, feeling, perception, formations, and consciousness. Pudgalavada sources and reconstructions preserve a Buddhist person that is neither identical with nor different from the aggregates, partly to protect karma, rebirth, liberation, and ordinary person-talk. That intra-Buddhist spread complicates any single Buddhism versus Atman comparison. Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 authorizes an unseen seer and knower, while Advaita disputes about recognition, self-luminosity, and scripture complicate how that knower is established. The Madhyamaka Bhaviveka and Candrakirti dispute adds a second internal variable: a tradition's assertion posture may be contested rather than fixed.

title: First Ask If a Path Agrees With Itself
unlike_statement: Unlike ordinary internal-diversity cautions, Freiberger's selection framework, Smith's redescription model, and world-religions essentialism critiques, this candidate proposes a specific admissibility test: a cross-tradition strain score has evidential weight only when between-tradition strain exceeds weighted within-tradition variance for the same claim unit.
